ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "msrp" TEXT /* Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP) */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., available, sold, in service) */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Engine size in liters */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level (e.g., base, premium, luxury) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "is_new" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle is new or used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned by the salesperson */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "trade_in_value" TEXT /* Trade-in value of the customer's old vehicle */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., cash, finance, lease) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_records" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle serviced */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the service */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., completed, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_service_type FOREIGN KEY ("service_type") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the salesperson */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "commission_rate" TEXT /* Commission rate of the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the technician */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the technician (e.g., engine, transmission, electrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)
column_names: License plate number of the vehicle
